discovery.instruction: In OpenCode, reference the worker file by passing it as context or mentioning it in your prompt

documentation.getting_started: OpenCode is the primary agent for Czarina. Run 'opencode' to start the TUI, or 'opencode run <message>' for non-interactive use. Reference worker files by mentioning them in your prompt.
tips: OpenCode has native git integration - follow the git workflow in worker prompts
OpenCode can create PRs directly using the gh CLI tool
Use 'opencode serve' for headless server mode
limitations: Requires CLI installation via installer script
Works best with well-structured markdown prompts

examples.title: Start a worker task (interactive TUI)
examples.description: Begin work on an engineer task interactively

examples.title: Start a worker task (non-interactive)
examples.description: Begin work with a specific instruction
examples.command: opencode run 'Read WORKER_IDENTITY.md and begin Task 1'
